chapter.heading: Bank Guarantees (BGs) created out of clients' funds

parent_section.heading: Bank Guarantees (BGs) created out of clients' funds
parent_section.full_text:
92. Bank Guarantees (BGs) created out of clients' funds112 
 
92.1. It has been decided to implement the following measures in order to safeguard 
the interests of the investors: - 
 
92.1.1. No new BGs shall be created out of clients' funds by SBs/CMs.   
 
92.1.2. Existing BGs created out of clients' funds shall be wound down by 
September 30, 2023. 
 
92.2. The provisions of this framework shall not be applicable for proprietary funds 
of SBs/CMs in any segment a nd SB's proprietary funds deposited with CM in 
the capacity of a client.  
 
92.3. The stock exchanges and clearing corporations shall take stock of the current 
position of the BGs issued out of clients' funds by SBs/CMs and monitor the 
wind down to ensure implementation of the circular without any disruption of 
services to clients. For the purpose, stock exchanges and clearing 
corporations shall put in place periodic reporting mechanisms for SBs/CMs.  
 
92.4. SBs/CMs shall be required to provide a certificate, by its statutory auditor 
confirming the implementation of provisions at para 91 of this circular. Such a 
certificate shall be submitted to stock exchanges/clearing corporations by 
October 16, 2023.  
 
92.5. Stock exchanges and clearing corporations shall verify the compliance of the 
provisions of the circular in their periodic inspections/reporting. They shall also 
                                                           
112 Reference: SEBI circular SEBI/HO/MIRSD/MIRSD-PoD-1/P/CIR/2023/061 dated April 25, 2023 
 
 
231  
 
 
evolve adequate mechanisms to address cases of SBs/CMs who do not 
comply with the provisions of the circular by the stipulated dates.

obligations.title: Prohibition on Creation of New BGs from Client Funds
obligations.obligation_text: Stock Brokers (SBs) and Clearing Members (CMs) must not create any new Bank Guarantees (BGs) out of clients' funds.
expected_controls: Policy and internal controls prohibiting creation of new BGs from client funds
System-level restrictions preventing routing of client funds toward BG creation
Periodic internal audit checks confirming no new BGs have been created from client funds

obligations.title: Wind Down of Existing BGs Created from Client Funds by September 30, 2023
obligations.obligation_text: Stock Brokers (SBs) and Clearing Members (CMs) must wind down all existing Bank Guarantees (BGs) that were created out of clients' funds by September 30, 2023.
expected_controls: Inventory/register of all existing BGs created from client funds with maturity dates
Documented wind-down plan with milestones tracked against the September 30, 2023 deadline
Escalation process to senior management if wind-down targets are at risk of being missed
Confirmation records evidencing each BG has been wound down by the deadline

obligations.title: Exemption of Proprietary Funds from BG Restrictions
obligations.obligation_text: The restrictions on Bank Guarantees (BGs) under this framework do not apply to proprietary funds of SBs/CMs in any segment, nor to an SB's proprietary funds deposited with a Clearing Member (CM) in the capacity of a client. SBs/CMs must ensure clear segregation between client funds and proprietary funds when managing BGs.
expected_controls: Clear accounting segregation between client funds and proprietary funds
Documentation identifying each BG as proprietary-funded or client-funded
Internal controls ensuring proprietary fund BG activities are not commingled with client funds

obligations.title: Participation in Stock Exchange/Clearing Corporation Reporting Mechanisms for BG Wind-Down
obligations.obligation_text: Stock Brokers (SBs) and Clearing Members (CMs) must participate in and comply with the periodic reporting mechanisms established by stock exchanges and clearing corporations to monitor the wind-down of Bank Guarantees (BGs) created out of clients' funds, providing accurate and timely data as required.
expected_controls: Designated compliance owner responsible for submitting BG wind-down reports to exchanges/clearing corporations
Internal data collection process to accurately capture BG positions for periodic reporting
Tracking system to record submission dates and confirm receipt of reports by exchanges/clearing corporations

obligations.title: Statutory Auditor Certificate Confirming BG Framework Implementation
obligations.obligation_text: Stock Brokers (SBs) and Clearing Members (CMs) must obtain a certificate from their statutory auditor confirming implementation of the BG framework provisions (as specified in para 91 of the master circular) and submit this certificate to the relevant stock exchanges and/or clearing corporations by October 16, 2023.
expected_controls: Timely engagement of the statutory auditor to review and certify BG framework compliance
Internal documentation package prepared for statutory auditor review (BG registers, wind-down evidence, fund segregation records)
Compliance calendar entry and escalation process to ensure certificate submission to exchanges/clearing corporations by October 16, 2023
Records of submitted certificates and acknowledgement of receipt from exchanges/clearing corporations

obligations.title: Compliance with Exchange/Clearing Corporation Inspections on BG Framework
obligations.obligation_text: Stock Brokers (SBs) and Clearing Members (CMs) must maintain adequate records and be prepared to demonstrate compliance with the BG framework provisions during periodic inspections and reporting conducted by stock exchanges and clearing corporations.
expected_controls: Maintenance of comprehensive and up-to-date records of all BG transactions and wind-down activities
Readiness procedures for regulatory inspections, including designated personnel and document retrieval processes
Internal periodic self-assessment against BG framework requirements ahead of scheduled inspections
